prompt:
Use case: background-extraction
Asset type: wide rear parallax overlay for scenes 1 and 6
Input images: Image 1 is the approved style reference only
Primary request: one long layered band of pale blue-gray paper-cut mountain mist and two distant mountain silhouettes, designed as a single complete wide overlay
Style/medium: handcrafted torn rice-paper collage matching Image 1
Composition/framing: horizontal strip across most of the canvas with generous padding and crisp complete edges
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat uniform solid #00ff00 chroma-key, no texture, shadow, gradient, floor or reflection
Constraints: no people, no buildings, no text, no logo, no watermark; do not use #00ff00 in the overlay
